name: Chicken in a Pot
recipeIngredient: 2 celery stalks with leaves cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the carrots, onions, and celery in the bottom of a crock-pot.
2. Add the whole chicken to the pot.
3. Sprinkle the salt, pepper, and basil over the top of the chicken.
4. Pour the liquid (chicken broth or wine) over the chicken.
5. Cover and cook until the chicken is done. Cook on low for 8 to 10 hours, or high for 3 to 4 hours if using 1 cup water.
6. Remove the cooked chicken and vegetables with a spatula.
